sec.title: Background
sec.p: Acute respiratory distress syndrome remains a major cause of ICU mortality.

sec.title: Methods
sec.p: We enrolled 861 patients with ARDS in a randomized trial. The primary outcomes were death before discharge and ventilator-free days.

sec.title: Results
sec.p: Mortality was 31.0% vs 39.8%, P = 0.007. Hazard ratio 0.78 (95% CI 0.65 to 0.94).

sec.title: Conclusions
sec.p: In patients with ARDS, mechanical ventilation with a lower tidal volume reduces mortality.
